title: verbascum × collinum subsp. killiasii
intro: Verbascum × collinum subsp. killiasii, also known as Killias' mullein, is a biennial plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae, known for its tall spikes of yellow flowers and edible foliage. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Verbascum × collinum subsp. killiasii include its ability to reduce inflammation, calm respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and salve, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
